result.markdown: --- title: utils.metrics.evaluate_detection --- ```python utils.metrics.evaluate_detection(detected, ground_truth, tolerance=0.5) ``` Complete evaluation of transition detection performance Calculates precision, recall, F1 score, and detailed counts (true positives, false positives, false negatives) in a single pass to ensure consistency. Uses one-to-one closest matching where each ground truth point matches only one detected point. ## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters} [**detected**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array](`array`) - [like](`like`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Detected transition points (indices or time values) [**ground_truth**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[array](`array`) - [like](`like`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Ground truth transition points (indices or time values) [**tolerance**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [0.5]{.parameter-default} : Maximum distance for a detected transition to be considered a true positive. Default is 0.5 ## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns} []{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[DetectionMetrics](`ammonyte.utils.metrics.DetectionMetrics`)]{.parameter-annotation} : Object containing: - precision : float - Precision score (0 to 1) - recall : float - Recall score (0 to 1) - f1_score : float - F1 score (0 to 1) - true_positives : int - Number of correct detections - false_positives : int - Number of incorrect detections - false_negatives : int - Number of missed ground truth events - n_detected : int - Total number of detections - n_ground_truth : int - Total number of ground truth events - tolerance : float - Tolerance used for matching ## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples} Basic usage: ::: {#bb0c6ee5 .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} from ammonyte.utils.metrics import evaluate_detection detected = [10, 25, 50, 75] ground_truth = [10, 26, 60] metrics = evaluate_detection(detected, ground_truth, tolerance=2) print(metrics) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Detection Evaluation Metrics ============================ Metrics calculated within tolerance = 2 Performance Scores: +-----------+---------+ | Metric | Value | +===========+=========+ | Precision | 0.5 | +-----------+---------+ | Recall | 0.6667 | +-----------+---------+ | F1 Score | 0.5714 | +-----------+---------+ Detection Counts: +-----------------+---------+ | Category | Count | +=================+=========+ | True Positives | 2 | +-----------------+---------+ | False Positives | 2 | +-----------------+---------+ | False Negatives | 1 | +-----------------+---------+ Summary: Detected: 4 | Ground Truth: 3 ``` ::: ::: Access individual metrics: ::: {#afbd3779 .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} from ammonyte.utils.metrics import evaluate_detection detected = [9.8, 23.5, 45.2] ground_truth = [10, 25, 40, 60] metrics = evaluate_detection(detected, ground_truth, tolerance=1.0) print(f"Precision: {metrics.precision:.3f}") print(f"Recall: {metrics.recall:.3f}") print(f"F1 Score: {metrics.f1_score:.3f}") ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` Precision: 0.333 Recall: 0.250 F1 Score: 0.286 ``` ::: ::: [[source]](https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte/blob/main/ammonyte/utils/metrics.py#L126-L280){.source-link target="_blank"}
